---
title: "lowercase note title"
description: "one clear sentence about the note"
week: 1
---

start from the mathematical distinction that matters. keep it concrete enough that the
reader knows what problem the note is solving.

name the objects involved and the kind of statement being studied.

---

### the definition

state the definition carefully. define every symbol before using it.

> **Definition.** Write the definition here.

explain what the definition is asking for in plain language.

---

### examples

give a small number of examples that reveal the structure.

- first example
- second example
- non-example, if useful

---

### the proof shape

if the note introduces a theorem or proof technique, separate hypotheses from the
conclusion before proving anything.

> **Claim.** Write the claim here.

expand the exact definition that drives the proof.

---

### what this leaves out

name the boundary of the note and what the next note should build on.
